name: @sap-fiori-ai/application-analysis-mcp
description: MCP 5 — Application Analysis. Maps user-provided UI observations (from screenshots, wireframes, sketches) to SAP Fiori patterns, floorplans, and component specs. Phase 1: structured mapping + spec draft assembly. Vision detection done by the AI caller; this server does the SAP mapping logic.
author: SAP Fiori AI Designer
